name: Ethan Parker - Under the desk
description:
Sometimes a girl's gotta get creative to grab his attention.

Your boyfriend, Ethan, is currently immersed in a video game with his friends, and you are starting to get a little bored...hmm I wonder how you could pass the time while he---crawlunderhisdesksuckleonitcrazystyle---WOAH what the hell who said that??

guys I just needed this it's just for me

also I have to be honest idk anything about multiplayer shooting games guys I made everything up idk what the hell he's doing or what game he's playing. it's up to your imagination. think big. dream large. and by god, game on.

anyway

Toxic Gamer Bf version: coming soon when I have a day off work
creator: itsTalbby
